title: Disable access to "files" feature?
excerpt: Is it possible to disable access to the Monday file management features? We won’t be using this feature and we’d like to remove the option from the item pages altogether to prevent confusion. I can’t seem to remove the “…

posts.author: jburroughs (Josh Burroughs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to disable access to the Monday file management features? We won’t be using this feature and we’d like to remove the option from the item pages altogether to prevent confusion. I can’t seem to remove the “files” tab when trying to customize the item view on any of our boards.

Thanks,

Josh
